description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with clean lines, multiple intersecting roof planes, and a mix of materials including white plaster, wood paneling, and large glass windows. The front facade showcases a prominent garage, a covered entryway, and expansive windows that allow natural light to flood the interior. The structure is set on a sloped lot, with the driveway and entry path integrated into the terrain. The rear and side elevations are more subdued, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The roof is composed of several overlapping shed-style sections, creating a dynamic silhouette. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending functionality with visual interest.
description: A modern two-story house with intersecting shed roofs, white plaster walls, wood accents, and large glass windows, set on a sloped lot. The design emphasizes clean lines and a mix of materials for a contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, garage, driveway, and large windows with wood and white plaster finishes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated facade, multiple windows, and the integration of the house into the sloped terrain.
description_view_2: Rear view with overlapping roof planes and minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the garage, secondary entry, and the stepped nature of the house on the slope.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a modern door adjacent to large glass panels.
